_unverified: ALL numbers below are UNVERIFIED placeholders encoding the VERIFIED weight DIRECTION (design+originality > craft+functionality). The per-criterion hard-threshold GATE is VERIFIED for Anthropic's CODING harness; its transfer to DESIGN criteria is UNVERIFIED.
_axe_note: Pinned 2026-06 (4.12.0 changed the active ruleset: added aria-tab-name, deprecated landmark-complementary-is-top-level). Must match RUN_MANIFEST.json + each artifact's axe_core_version (L7 precondition P3).

anti_bias._cross_family_note: M1: judge_model_id family MUST differ from generator_model_id family. Self-preference tracks self-recognition/familiarity (Panickssery 2404.13076; Wataoka 2410.21819). The k=3 ensemble below MUST be a cross-family PANEL, not same-model self-consistency (Verga, Replacing Judges with Juries 2404.18796).
anti_bias._length_note: M1: position-swap does NOT neutralize verbosity bias (Length-Controlled AlpacaEval 2404.04475). The evaluator MUST judge against the brief, never reward length/verbosity. Lock both model ids in the run manifest.

weight_direction._note: DIRECTION is VERIFIED (Anthropic harness post). The exact weights are UNVERIFIED. L7 precondition P2 aborts the loop if the numeric weights below violate this direction.

_floor_note: PARTIAL automated floor. axe-core auto-detects ~57% of WCAG issues; ~43% need human judgment (Deque: deque.com/automated-accessibility-coverage-report). The floor is NOT WCAG-complete. Human-seat 43%-class findings enter as advisory change_requests, not floor keys. Standard targeted: WCAG 2.2 AA (current W3C Recommendation).
_slop_flag_note: pattern_verified=true means the PATTERN is a real SKILL.md AI-slop tell (verified). The penalty NUMBER is UNVERIFIED in every case (see file header).

ensemble._note: auto seat only; CROSS-FAMILY panel (M1), per-criterion voting on creative axes; samples/stdev -> sidecar, never gated
